  1. uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource
  2. Resource

Uses of Class
uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource.Resource

Packages that use Resource
Package
Description
uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource
Provides the V2 Universal Resource Pipeline (URP) infrastructure.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource.handle
Low-level connectivity and metadata abstraction for resources.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource.view
Managed viewports and stateful data interpretation for resources.
uno.anahata.asi.nb.ui.render
Provides the visual rendering layer for agentic file write operations within NetBeans.
uno.anahata.asi.nb.ui.resources
Provides the visual and interactive layer for NetBeans-specific resource handles.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.context
Provides components and hierarchical models for the ASI Context Explorer.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.message.part.tool.param
Provides specialized renderers for individual tool parameters.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.resources
Provides UI components for managing and interacting with multimodal resources.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.resources.view
Provides specialized UI components for viewing and editing managed resources.

    Field
    Description

    ResourceManager.resources
    Registry of V2 resources, keyed by UUID.

    Method
    Description

    ResourceManager.get(@NonNull String uuid)
    Finds a managed resource by its uuid
    Resource

    Registers a pre-created resource handle directly.
    Resource
    ResourceManager.unregister(@NonNull String id)
    Unregisters a resource and cleans up its handle.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Optional<Resource>
    ResourceManager.findByPath(@NonNull String path)
    Finds a managed resource by its physical path.
    Optional<Resource>
    ResourceManager.findByUri(@NonNull String uri)
    Finds a managed resource by its URI.
    List<Resource>
    ResourceManager.getResourcesList()
    Returns an unmodifiable list of currently managed resources.
    List<Resource>
    ResourceManager.registerPaths(@NonNull List<Path> paths, String registeredBy)
    Registers multiple filesystem paths as managed resources.
    List<Resource>
    ResourceManager.unregisterAll(@NonNull Collection<String> ids)
    Unregisters multiple resources in a single operation and fires a single refresh event.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ResourceManager.register(@NonNull Resource resource, String registeredBy)
    Registers a new V2 resource, making it managed by the framework.

    NbResourceUI.getPath(Resource resource)
    Resolves the physical path from the handle for IDE navigation.

    Opens the resource in the host environment's preferred viewer or editor.

    Injects host-specific actions into the provided container.
    void
    NbResourceUI.select(Resource resource, AgiPanel agiPanel)
    Selects and highlights the resource in the host environment's navigation component (e.g., Projects tree).
